name: Development feature: dark mode and Timeora branding
description: Verify Timeora branding assets, switch to dark mode, and confirm the theme persists across landing, login, and register pages.

planSteps.description: Verify the Timeora landing page shows the Timeora logomark and product name in light mode
Verify the landing page changes to dark mode and the dark-mode Timeora logo is visible
Verify the login page remains in dark mode and shows the dark-mode Timeora branding
Click the Create one registration link
Verify the register page remains in dark mode and shows the Timeora branding and account creation form
Navigate back to https://timeora-alpha.vercel.app/ and click Toggle theme
Verify the landing page returns to light mode
